name: io.github.ap311036/ews-meeting-mcp
title: EWS Meeting MCP
description: Safely schedule Outlook meetings on on-prem Exchange EWS with preview-confirmed writes.

environmentVariables.name: EWS_EMAIL
environmentVariables.description: Mailbox email address used as the meeting organizer.

environmentVariables.name: EWS_USERNAME
environmentVariables.description: Exchange login username, often DOMAIN\username for NTLM.

environmentVariables.name: EWS_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: Exchange password. Prefer macOS Keychain variables when possible.

environmentVariables.name: EWS_PASSWORD_KEYCHAIN_SERVICE
environmentVariables.description: Optional macOS Keychain service name for reading the password locally.

environmentVariables.name: EWS_PASSWORD_KEYCHAIN_ACCOUNT
environmentVariables.description: Optional macOS Keychain account. Defaults to EWS_USERNAME when omitted.

environmentVariables.name: EWS_AUTH_TYPE
environmentVariables.description: Exchange auth type. Usually NTLM for on-prem Exchange.
